title: The Yellow Devil
overview: A mysterious and feared masked wrestler named Tiger Mask, who has already made headlines throughout the Americas for his notorious dishonesty, returns to Japan. Regarded with disfavor by the entire Japan Pro-Wrestling Association, he is immediately ostracized; the only one who seems to understand him, despite everything, is Giant Baba, a respected and extremely honest pro-wrestler. Kenta, a boy living in the Chibikko House orphanage, despite everything and everyone, shows—uniquely among the children—a tremendous admiration for Tiger Mask. The two young people who currently run this shelter for abandoned children are also former orphans, a brother and sister: Kenta reminds him strongly of their old friend Naoto Date at his age, who ran away over ten years earlier and never returned, when after a visit to the zoo, standing in front of the tiger's cage, he resolutely declared that he too wanted to one day become as strong as a tiger...

title: Tiger the Stormbringer
overview: Little Kenta runs away from the orphanage to attend a match with Tiger Man, who is as ruthless as ever with his opponents.

title: The Man Who Returned
overview: Naoto returns to the orphanage where he grew up. While in the role of the Tiger Mask, he must face Monster, the man with the steel head.

title: Law of Tiger's Cave
overview: Uomo Tigre reflects on his training at the Tiger's Den, which subjected him to cruel and nearly unbearable training.

title: Tiger Is Ready to Die
overview: Mister X threatens Tigre d'Acciaio because he wants him to give him half of the money he earns from the matches at the Tiger Cage.

title: Terrible Death Match
overview: At the airport, a tiger escapes, but Pitone Nero, the next opponent of the Tiger Mask, stops her by rendering her docile with his charisma.

title: The Bloodstained Tiger
overview: After Ruriko asks Tiger Mask to fight fairly, he wins his first match without using illegal moves.

title: Trap of Tiger's Cave
overview: Ruriko begins to suspect that the Tiger Mask is actually Naoto, who, in the meantime, must evade the attacks of Mister X.

title: The Starved Gorilla Man
overview: The gigantic Gorilla Man arrives in Japan, the next opponent of Tiger Mask sent by the Tiger Cage.

title: Fresh-Bomb Megaton Drop
overview: Uomo Tigre is training for his next match, but Baba makes it clear that his method is wrong.

title: The Marvelous World League
overview: Baba tries to convince Tiger Mask to participate in the next World Tournament, but he is hesitant.

title: For Whom He Fights?
overview: Uomo Tigre fears that he will not be able to contain his unorthodox style for the World Tournament, but he will soon change his mind.

title: The Terrible Hell Operation
overview: During the meeting with Stella di Teschio, Mister X causes a blackout in the arena to carry out another one of his evil plans.

title: Secret Training in Tiger's Cave
overview: Daimon, Naoto's training partner, sends a letter to his friend from the Tiger's Den. However, Mister X gets ahold of it and uses it to blackmail him.

title: Victory with Countless Wounds
overview: Caught up in the excitement of cheering, Kenta breaks the orphanage's television, leaving the children unable to watch the next Tiger Mask match.

title: Defeated Tiger
overview: Stella di Teschio refuses to kill Naoto and is killed by Tana delle Tigre instead. L'Uomo Ombra doesn't want the same thing to happen to him.

title: Tiger Awaked
overview: Cappy is hit by a hit-and-run driver. Naoto and Kenta set out to find her.

title: The Fate Showdown
overview: Mister X tries to force Daimon to fight Naoto, even using torture. In the end, the man gives in and decides to face his friend in the ring.

title: Two Hours Till the Starting Bout
overview: L'Uomo Tigre decides to help a boy he just met. Will he make it back in time for his match?

title: Shadow of Tiger's Cave
overview: Naoto takes the orphans to the amusement park, but he is pursued by Tana delle Tigri there as well.

title: The Red Fang with Revenge
overview: Brisco had been confined to a wheelchair by Tiger Man when he was still evil. Now his brother has arrived in Japan to seek revenge.

title: Challenge for Tomorrow
overview: Tiger Man suffers an injury during a match and should rest, but his next match is too close.

title: Tiger Risks His Life
overview: Tana delle Tigri selects a group of masked wrestlers to send against Tiger Man.

title: The Opening of the Maskmen League
overview: Tigre decides to participate in the masked wrestlers' tournament to help the blind orphan girl. His first opponent is Mister No.

title: Deadly Battle with the Golden Mask
overview: Tiger Man must face two other masked wrestlers in the tournament in quick succession. The two use completely illegal tricks.

title: Beyond the Glory
overview: A mysterious new masked wrestler joins the tournament and teams up with Tiger Man against Lion Man and the Egyptian Mummy.

title: Open Your Eyes, Tiger
overview: With the money from the tournament, Tiger Man can finally get little Lory operated on, in the hope that she will regain her sight.

title: Tiger's Cave Revives
overview: Tana delle Tigri decides to build a new, larger, and more modern headquarters, while Mister X travels the world in search of new talent.

title: Challenger Strong
overview: Joe Fortis arrives in Japan to challenge Tiger Man. The new wrestler turns out to be a former coach of Naoto and Daimon.

title: The Eternal Burning Spirit: Rikidozan Story
overview: Naoto is very tense because he still can't come up with a winning move. Master Arashi tells him the story of a great champion from the past.

title: So Special Training at Daisetsuzan
overview: The Apollon brothers arrive in Japan. The younger brother is determined to challenge Tiger Man, who is training in the mountains to find his winning move.

title: His Special Attack Is Born!
overview: Tiger Man faces Ursus, the youngest of the Apollon brothers. During the match, he decides to use his new winning move.

title: The Marvelous Battle
overview: Tiger Man prepares for his match against Star, but he is quite worried. The day of the match arrives, and the two fight a great battle.

title: A Hot-Blooded Boy in Tiger's Cave
overview: The new talents at the Tiger's Den begin training that seems very different from what Naoto did in his day.

title: Road to the Champion: Giant Baba Story
overview: Tigre fears returning to his former self as an unfair fighter, so Baba decides to tell him his story and all the difficulties he had to face.

title: The Opening of All Asia Championship
overview: Tiger Man leaves for the Asian tournament and gradually gets to know all the wrestlers who will be participating.

title: The Yeti of Himalaya
overview: Tiger Man's first opponent is a giant Indian wrestler who hides a disturbing secret.

title: Tiger Who Aims at the Champion
overview: The Asian tournament is in full swing and every fighter is giving it their all. Tiger Man identifies Mister Ki as his most formidable opponent.

title: Victory Crown with Tears
overview: Mister Ki has found the winning counterattack to the "tiger's fall," and Tiger Man must find a solution quickly if he wants to win the final.

title: Triumphant Return of Tiger the Phoenix
overview: Tiger Man returns triumphant to Japan, but he knows he will never be able to use his "tiger drop" again.

title: The Red Death Mask
overview: The "Tiger Drop" is no longer effective, and Diavolo manages to defeat Naoto. At the end of the match, a new formidable wrestler from Tiger's Den arrives.

title: No Tomorrow for Tiger
overview: Death Mask seems like a truly unbeatable fighter, and everyone is very concerned about Tiger Man's fate.

title: The Strongest Heel on the Earth
overview: Death Mask proves himself to be a violent and ruthless fighter. Tiger will have to abandon his fair fighting style once again if he wants to win the match.

title: The Challenge from Kamikaze
overview: Naoto returns to the United States to fight in matches, but he is deeply troubled by what he did during his match against Death Mask.

title: A Boy with Nostalgia to Home Country
overview: Tigre arrives in Germany to face the giant Mapman. Meanwhile, the wrestler decides to have a new mask made to replace his worn-out one.

title: The Secret Mission of Tiger's Cave
overview: A young French wrestler leaves the Tiger's Den to find his father. Naoto decides to help him to prevent the boy from returning to that frightening place.

title: Verbal Warfare in the Ring
overview: Tiger Man must face Jungle King, a fierce fighter with mysterious powers. Tiger is warned by a previous opponent of the black fighter.

title: The Battle with Kamikaze
overview: The time has finally come for Tiger Man to face Kamikaze. Naoto has learned from previous encounters and is training to develop a new winning move.

title: Tiger Mask Revives
overview: Naoto returns to Japan after his European successes. His compatriots are eager to see his new final move.

title: Give Your Affection to the Children
overview: Tigre and other wrestlers are in Hiroshima for a series of matches. Naoto is fascinated by a model and wants to get his hands on it at all costs.

title: An Eagle and a Tiger
overview: Japanese wrestlers are determined to defend their colors, but foreign wrestlers use every kind of foul play to take home the victory.

title: Win the the World League!
overview: Mister X has something in mind regarding the tournament final between Tiger Man and Bill Hercules. What could his evil plan be?

title: Mystery of the Miracles
overview: Ken continues to train at the Tiger's Den, more determined than ever to defeat Tiger Man, whom he believes is responsible for his mother's death.

title: A New Friend
overview: A new girl arrives at Ruriko's orphanage. Little Micro seems rather spoiled and is unable to fit in with her new friends.

title: The Sun in Soot and Smoke
overview: Tiger Man and other wrestlers arrive in a city submerged by pollution. An orphan protests against a company to protect the health of his friend.

title: The Black Deity
overview: Popo Africa suffered a crushing defeat at the hands of Tiger Man when the latter was fighting as the Yellow Demon. Now he's back and swears revenge.

title: His V-Sign Calls Death In
overview: Nero V arrives in Japan determined to avenge his master Popo Africa. The fighter is very confident and immediately shows everyone his secret technique.

title: Black V
overview: The eagerly awaited match between Tiger Man and Nero V is about to begin, but first Baba and Inoki must face the Miracle Brothers.

title: A Reckless Challenge
overview: Tigre arrives at the dojo of one of his instructors and a friend of Master Arashi. Here he meets a young man determined to fight him in order to pay off his accumulated debts.

title: Tiger and a Awkward Doctor
overview: Tiger Man meets a doctor on a train who is addicted to alcohol. The doctor wants to treat a boy who has been in an accident, and Naoto offers his help.

title: Road of "Shogi" King
overview: Rudy, a new wrestler from Tiger's Den, says he is confident he can stop Tiger Man's winning move. Meanwhile, the wrestler prevents a sculptor from committing suicide.

title: The Black Challenger
overview: Tiger Man reads in a newspaper that a wrestler has died in the ring at the hands of the mysterious Black Panther. Naoto fears that he may be his next opponent.

title: "Meriken" Joe
overview: Tiger Man faces Demon, but thoughts of his upcoming opponents distract him considerably. However, an old man in the audience manages to spur him on.

title: Till When the Fortunate Bell Rings
overview: Naoto meets a young boy who is sitting alone looking sad, even though it's Christmas. The wrestler decides to follow him to find out what his problems are.

title: Deadly Battle on the Maskmen Championship
overview: Naoto meets Daimon at Master Arashi's dojo, and the two train together in preparation for Tiger's match against Black Panther.

title: The Terror of Tiger's Cave
overview: Naoto looks after Kenta, who is confined to bed with a fever. The child shows him an album of photographs of Tiger Man, and Naoto relives his career through those photos.

title: Resurrection of the Yellow Devil
overview: A new wrestler has recently appeared in America who calls himself the Yellow Devil, which is the old pseudonym of Tiger Man. Naoto is impressed.

title: Phantom of the Yellow Devil
overview: Tiger Man investigates the identity of the Yellow Devil and begins to strongly suspect that it is Ken. If it really is him, it would be very difficult for Naoto to fight him.

title: The Rule-Brake Challenger
overview: The young Junker from Tiger's Den challenges Tiger Man, disregarding the wishes of his organization. Meanwhile, the boy meets a child who is friends with Naoto.

title: Regret at the Ring
overview: Tiger Man and Kamikaze face off once again. However, Naoto cannot come to terms with Hans' death and swears revenge against Tana delle Tigri.

title: Tiger Meets the Crisis!
overview: Re Giaguaro, rising star of the American West, is chosen as Tiger Man's next challenger. This opponent also comes from Tiger's Den.

title: Mr. Fudo Comes Onstage
overview: Daimon finally returns to the ring wearing Mr. Fudo's mask. His strong performance wins over the hearts of fans.

title: The Trump of Tiger's Cave
overview: Yellow Devil finally manages to convince the Tiger's Den to let him meet Tiger Man. Ken is increasingly determined to avenge his mother.

title: The Traitor No.3
overview: Ken is kidnapped by Mr. X and Tana delle Tigri's hitmen. Daimon sets off in pursuit to save the boy's life.

title: Great Escape from Tiger's Cave
overview: Ken begins wrestling without a mask for the Japanese federation and enjoys great success. Some young people from Tana delle Tigri would like to follow his example.

title: The Phantom Wrestlers
overview: Black Tiger and Big Tiger challenge Tiger Man and Daimon. Naoto seems quite intimidated and does not want to tell his friend the news.

title: Tag Team in the Deadly Battle
overview: The day of the match against Big Tiger and Black Tiger has finally arrived. The fight is particularly violent, and all the wrestlers seem determined to fight to the death.

title: Tiger Against Tiger
overview: Daimon is in critical condition, and Naoto and Ken are very worried. As if that weren't enough, Naoto also has to face the Tiger King.

title: The Big Boss of Tiger's Cave
overview: The leader of Tiger's Den is very upset after the defeat of his best fighters, so he orders Mister X to assassinate Tiger Man.

title: A Nova Is Born
overview: Ken is improving visibly, but he still can't eliminate certain incorrect moves from his repertoire. Baba decides to put his trust in him anyway.

title: The Promotor in Hell
overview: Ken's popularity continues to grow. In his next match, he faces Black Hurricane, a very experienced and formidable wrestler.

title: The Deadly Battle in Cage
overview: Mister X has chosen Maschera Universo as Tiger Man's next challenger. The wrestler has remarkable athletic skills, which he shows off in front of journalists and Ken.

title: When Does Happiness Come?
overview: Micro accompanies Ruriko to choose a wedding gift for her friend. There she meets her aunt and uncle, who recognize her and want to take her home with them.

title: An Oath for Victory
overview: Ken will fight his first tag team match alongside Tiger Man. The young man is going through a happy period, but Mr. X returns to haunt him.

title: The Hunter of Death
overview: Mister X is increasingly determined to eliminate Tiger Man in order to save his own life. For this reason, he decides to no longer limit himself in choosing fighters.

title: Jekyll and Hyde
overview: Tiger invites the children and Ruriko to his next match. His opponent this time is very unusual, as he has a split personality.

title: The Tiger Hunting Plan
overview: Mister X is becoming increasingly agitated due to his continuous failures. Meanwhile, Naoto has to worry about little Gaboten, who has been taken away by the police.

title: Scaffold with Fire
overview: Mister X, now at his limit, wants to eliminate Tiger before the leader of Tiger's Den arrives in Japan, to avoid his wrath.

title: Happiness of Yoshi-bo
overview: Naoto takes a day off and decides to spend it at Ruriko's orphanage. There, he discovers that a family wants to adopt little Yoshibo.

title: The Uncrowned Champ
overview: Mister X travels to America in search of new talent to recruit and unleash against Tiger Man. He eventually finds someone interested in his offer.

title: Devilish Spider Nest
overview: The leader of Tiger's Den arrives in Japan and contemplates returning to the ring to face Tiger Man. Meanwhile, he has brought a new opponent with him.

title: Suspicion of the Mysterious Man
overview: The leader of Tiger's Den decides to join the Japanese Federation. Here he takes on the identity of Mistero Nero and asks to face only foreign wrestlers.

title: For Today's Life
overview: Mistero Nero proves increasingly difficult to defeat and continues to beat his opponents with extreme ease.

title: The Substitute of Tiger
overview: Naoto's next opponents have been announced, but Mistero Nero is still not among them. What could the leader of Tana delle Tigri have in mind?

title: The Piranhan
overview: Tiger Man will fight for the first time in a ring completely surrounded by water. His opponent is the fearsome Piranha.

title: Who Is Tiger Mask?
overview: Kenta wants to discover Tiger Man's identity at all costs and believes he can find out from Ken. For this reason, he tries to trap him.

title: Presentiment of Defeat
overview: Technique, speed, and strength. Mistero Nero seems to have no weaknesses and continues to defeat opponents with great ease.

title: The Desperate Tiger
overview: Tiger Man is increasingly troubled by thoughts of Mistero Nero. Meanwhile, Kenta gets involved in a fight with three young bullies.

title: Howl for Blood, Wolf!
overview: Tana delle Tigri sends another fighter to battle Tiger Man: Lupo Solitario. For Mistero Nero, this is another opportunity to study Naoto's techniques.

title: Create Your Own Tomorrow
overview: A man arrives at the orphanage claiming to be Yoshibo's father, but he does not reveal himself to the child. The next morning, his younger brother also shows up.

title: The Execution of Tiger's Cave
overview: Mistero Nero challenges Ken to a fight. Naoto is very worried about his friend, who accepts the challenge without hesitation.

title: The Truth of Tiger's Cave
overview: Ken is in terrible condition and also needs blood transfusions. Naoto swears revenge against the evil Great Tiger.

title: The Struggle Tiger's Cave
overview: Ruriko has finally discovered Tiger Man's secret. However, she is distraught because she fears that Naoto will be killed by Big Tiger.

title: The Bloody Battle with Tiger's Cave!
overview: Naoto learns of Mister X's death from the newspaper. Now, Big Tiger is the last remaining member of Tiger's Den, as well as her upcoming opponent.

title: Tiger Mask Goes Away
overview: The match between Tiger Man and Great Tiger is extremely violent. The evil wrestler uses every means possible to defeat his opponent. Will Naoto manage to win again this time?

title: Howl! The Oath of the Ring
overview: Suddenly, a masked wrestler and space mask science fiction that forces Antonio Inoki to challenge appeared. He was an assassin sent by the mysterious organization, the Space Pro-Wrestling Federation. Space mask science fiction that bursts into the ring and challenges Inoki. There, a man with a tiger mask appeared like a gale. He calls himself Tiger Mask II, the successor of Naoto Date's will!

title: The Man Who Was Forged in the Hole of the Tiger
overview: The Space Pro-Wrestling Federation begins to explore the identity of Tiger Mask. The defeated space mask science fiction approaches Inoki to rematch Tiger. But Inoki didn't know the whereabouts of Tiger... At that time, Tiger appears in front of Inoki and begins to talk about his true identity. There is also a huge evil shadow approaching in the Japanese professional wrestling world...

title: The Battle to Death in Masks
overview: Space mask SF that lost the first game and burned with revenge. A one-game game between him and Tiger Mask was about to begin. In this game, each other's masks are supposed to be bet. As soon as the gong rings, the exchange of advanced techniques begins. The tiger that is gradually being driven into inferiority explodes with the special move of the space mask!

title: Tora, Inhaler of Blood
overview: A terrible conspiracy was revealed by Space Mask SF. The Space Professional Wrestling Federation was trying to take over the Japanese professional wrestling world. Moreover, the Space Professional Wrestling Federation will immediately send in a second assassin. It's The Bat, which is good at simitling attacks. Bat defeats the popular villain wrestler Bigwood and forces Tiger to confront him!

title: Youth Hunting
overview: Tatsuo begins to investigate the disappearance of some high school students, all of them emerged in various sports.

title: The Burning Fight Spirit
overview: Tiger Mask II and the police rescue the boys from the ship.

title: Puzzle of Tiger Perimeter
overview: Tiger Mask II takes Inoki by car to the foot of Mount Fuji by showing him, through the crack of the trunk of a tree, a pyramid, which for years has remained hidden by vegetation.

title: Decisive Battle! Tag Match
overview: Mister Who N ° 1 and N ° 2 have just arrived by plane in Japan, while Midori informs Tatsuo that the true identity of Kyuketsu-Kamen The Bat has been discovered.

title: Dangerous! Japanese Pro Wrestling
overview: The match against Mister Who N ° 1 and N ° 2 is becoming a massacre, in fact they are dominating the match by attacking their opponents in two against one as Inoki and Tiger Mask II persist in fighting loyally.

title: The Challenge of Iron Mask
overview: At the airport Tatsuo meets Rita, a friend and American journalist.

title: The Cold-Hearted Rule
overview: Tiger mask faces iron mask but he notes that there is something familiar in the Iron Mask technique, equal to that of Rita.

title: The Hawk of Hell
overview: The mysterious head of the Space Wrestling Federation decides to go personally to Japan to attend the tag match where their new masked wrestlers.

title: The Thousand Knocks of Shigeo Nagashima
overview: Tatsuo learns that Emir Arman Hassan, with whom Japan has entered into an agreement for the sale and purchase of oil, will come to Yokohama aboard his luxury ship.

title: Immortal Champion Belt
overview: Tatsuo is working out the counter-move with which to beat the Hawk of Hell

title: A Space Professional Wrestling Union!?
overview: The day of the match against the Hell Hawks has arrived, Hassan also attends the match sitting in a front row seat.

title: Tatsuo Aku Approaches Hassan
overview: Nobody welcomes the fact that Inoki and Tiger Mask II do not want to sell New Japan Pro-Wrestling to Hassan despite the fact that he threatens to no longer distribute oil to Japan.

title: Recollection: Pro Wrestling's Way
overview: Tiger Mask, attacked by Hassan's rugby team, remembers his youth in the United States, studied in New York and worked for a newsroom.

title: Trap! One Second Before Gong
overview: A helicopter lands on the Oil King, the passenger is Seido Muscle, a huge savage who will be the partner of Shinigami Silver in the upcoming tag match against Inoki and Tiger Mask II.

title: Death God Silver's Betrayal
overview: The tag match begins and Tiger Mask II faces Shinigami Silver whose build has claws and sharp horns with which it puts the opponent in difficulty.

title: Crash! Tiger Hurricane
overview: Shinigami Silver and Tiger Mask II face off in a great match but are then interrupted by Geller and his hit men.

title: Hassan's Secret
overview: Tiger Mask II trains with Inoki asking him to fight alone against Seido Muscle.

title: Push Down Bronze Muscle!
overview: The match begins but Seido Muscle does not suffer the attacks of Tiger Mask II thanks to his muscles.

title: Butcher's Condition of Challenge
overview: Abdullah the Butcher, a strong and famous Canadian wrestler, wants to challenge Tiger Mask II in a match.

title: Tiger VS Butcher
overview: Butcher gives Midori a private interview and reveals his past, the humiliations and sufferings he has suffered but which he has overcome, in addition to the motivations that led him to challenge Tiger Mask II in a match to the death.

title: Men's Battle
overview: Butcher puts Tiger Mask II in difficulty with his fast karate techniques, despite the masked wrestler defends himself very well, but Butcher starts fighting not respecting the rules.

title: The Anger of Shun Hansen
overview: American wrestlers not finding it right that the Space Wrestling Federation only fights against New Japan Pro-Wrestling decide to come forward, in fact one of them, Stan Hansen, challenges Devil Puma.

title: The Gun Which Calls the Storm
overview: The night of the match between Tiger Mask II and Devil Puma has arrived.

title: Devil Chop of Fear
overview: Tiger Mask II and Devil Puma face off in a match with no time limit, in a clash where both demonstrate that they have practically the same strength.

title: Fly! Tatsuo Aku
overview: Tatsuo brings Giena to Hakone and then two helicopters arrive, which suspects Tatsuo in fact those are the hit men of the Space Wrestling Federation. Geller, accompanied by Devil Puma, tries to kill Giena.

title: Shivering Battle Royale
overview: Tiger Mask II continues to fight against Devil Puma, who puts him in serious trouble with his deadly karate moves.

title: Hassan's Fire Blowing Anger
overview: Tiger Mask II reaches the ring for Battle Royale, then riding a horse comes Hakuma Knight, the second strongest wrestler in the Space Wrestling Federation.

title: The Gong's High Ringing Decisive Battle
overview: Hassan proposes that the strongest wrestler in the Space Wrestling Federation fight against André The Giant.

title: The Unwanted Result at the Battle's Conclusion
overview: Tiger Mask II and The Strongs continue to fight in an exceptional match.
